headline: 3 Fintech Stocks To Own For Years of Passive Income
summary: The April 2026 market selloff has reminded income investors of a timeless truth: earned income can be cut, bonuses can vanish, and job security is never guaranteed. Passive income from dividend-paying stocks requires only owning shares in companies that distribute cash to shareholders on a predictable schedule, with no need to time the market, predict ... 3 Fintech Stocks To Own For Years of Passive Income
